season_weather: 初夏。桜はすでに散り、若葉・新緑が眩しい。汗ばむ陽気。Tシャツ・薄手シャツ
casual_outfit: Pastel pink cropped sweater, floral midi skirt, denim jacket, white slip-on sneakers, and a crossbody bag.
room_wear: soft pink spaghetti-strap camisole top, loose cream linen wide pants
pajamas: soft lavender silk-look camisole and wide-leg shorts pajama set
room_base: Tokyo 6-tatami one-room apartment. White bed cover, natural wood bed frame. White desk near the window with a MacBook Air M2 in Starlight. Beige lace curtains. White walls with a few postcards pinned. Warm-colored table lamp.
room_clutter: MacBook Air M2 open on the desk with a few sticky notes around it
room_seasonal: a small vase with fresh green leaves and white small flowers on the windowsill

afternoon.label: 自由（外出）
afternoon.scene: shopping at a shopping mall or walking around a busy shopping street

evening.label: バイト（週末シフト）
evening.scene: leaving the cafe after weekend work shift
